channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dimension 20: Gladlands Trailer
item.description:
Welcome to a world gone glad. New series premieres January 7th.

Duration: 02:40

Tags: Dimension 20, Gladlands, mad max, post apocalyptic, dystopian, chaos, driving, cars, motorcycles, climate change, frog and toad, paddington bear, wholesome, optimism, cheerful, cozy, charming, friendship, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, ally beardsley, kimia behpoornia, vic michaelis, oscar montoya, zac oyama, jacob wysocki, brennan lee mulligan
